title: Daniel’s Fudge Pie
ingredients: (adapted from Rosie’s All Butter, Fresh Cream, Sugar-Packed Cookbook)
1 pie crust, lightly baked (use pie weights)
Make the pie crust and cool the lightly baked shell.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Melt the chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler or carefully in the microwave. Cool until mixture is tepid.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat the eggs and sugar in a medium-sized mixing bowl until mixture is thick and light yellow, about 2 minutes. Add the chocolate mixture and mix on medium speed until blended, about 30 seconds, occasionally scraping sides of the bowl.

Cover the edge of the pie crust with aluminum foil to prevent it from burning. Pour the chocolate filling in shell and bake for 35-40 minutes. Remove the aluminum foil from the crust after 30 minutes of baking.
Serve the pie warm with whipped cream.
Growing up, this was one of Dan’s favorite desserts! As it is a quick dessert to create, we often had this for our Sunday dinner dessert. This pie is often baked for our Thanksgiving feast.
